feature.name: Dotenv parse and set_key core
feature.description: Extract .env file parsing with quote/escape handling, POSIX variable expansion, and set_key file mutation without importing dotenv.
included_behaviors: parse key=value pairs from stream with export prefix and comments
single- and double-quoted values with escape sequences
UTF-8 BOM stripping at file start
set_key creates or updates keys with auto-quoting
excluded_behaviors: load_dotenv os.environ side effects in hidden tests

entanglement.description: Dotenv parsing couples regex-driven lexer state, quote escape tables, ordered variable resolution against prior bindings, and atomic file rewrite for set_key.
signals: parse_stream Reader position tracks multiline quoted values
resolve_variables merges os.environ with parsed order
set_key rewrites file preserving unrelated lines and newlines

output.import: import featurelifted; from featurelifted import dotenv_values, set_key, get_key
